name: Mailgun
description: Email API for sending, receiving, and tracking email. Provides transactional sending, event tracking, mailing lists, email validation, and delivery analytics.

auth.note: Use HTTP Basic Auth with 'api' as username and your API key as password.

capabilities.name: messages_send
capabilities.description: Send an email message via the Mailgun API.

capabilities.name: messages_send_mime
capabilities.description: Send a MIME email message directly.

capabilities.name: messages_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a stored message by its storage key.

capabilities.name: events_list
capabilities.description: Query the event log to track deliveries, opens, clicks, bounces, and failures.

capabilities.name: domains_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a list of all domains in your account.

capabilities.name: domains_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single domain by name.

capabilities.name: domains_create
capabilities.description: Create a new sending domain.

capabilities.name: domains_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a domain.

capabilities.name: domains_verify
capabilities.description: Verify a domain's DNS records.

capabilities.name: bounces_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve the list of bounced email addresses for a domain.

capabilities.name: bounces_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single bounce record by email address.

capabilities.name: bounces_create
capabilities.description: Add an address to the bounce list.

capabilities.name: bounces_delete
capabilities.description: Remove an address from the bounce list.

capabilities.name: bounces_clear
capabilities.description: Clear all bounces for a domain.

capabilities.name: complaints_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve spam complaints for a domain.

capabilities.name: unsubscribes_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve unsubscribed email addresses for a domain.

capabilities.name: unsubscribes_create
capabilities.description: Add an address to the unsubscribe list.

capabilities.name: unsubscribes_delete
capabilities.description: Remove an address from the unsubscribe list.

capabilities.name: routes_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all routes for incoming email processing.

capabilities.name: routes_create
capabilities.description: Create a new route for incoming email processing.

capabilities.name: routes_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single route by ID.

capabilities.name: routes_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing route.

capabilities.name: routes_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a route.

capabilities.name: mailing_lists_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all mailing lists.

capabilities.name: mailing_lists_create
capabilities.description: Create a new mailing list.

capabilities.name: mailing_lists_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single mailing list.

capabilities.name: mailing_lists_update
capabilities.description: Update a mailing list.

capabilities.name: mailing_lists_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a mailing list.

capabilities.name: mailing_lists_members_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve members of a mailing list.

capabilities.name: mailing_lists_members_add
capabilities.description: Add a member to a mailing list.

capabilities.name: mailing_lists_members_delete
capabilities.description: Remove a member from a mailing list.

capabilities.name: webhooks_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all webhooks for a domain.

capabilities.name: webhooks_create
capabilities.description: Create a new webhook for a domain.

capabilities.name: webhooks_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing webhook.

capabilities.name: webhooks_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a webhook.

capabilities.name: email_validate
capabilities.description: Validate an email address for deliverability, syntax, and disposable status.

capabilities.name: stats_total
capabilities.description: Retrieve total statistics for a domain.
